name: display-inv-junction-equivalence
description: Display-sweep W4 frozen invariant (Qualia spec/DISPLAY-BEHAVIOR.md): the render.junction.* persona path and a direct activeJunction perf write are the SAME lever — applying either from the same base yields identical activeJunction + identical junction frame geometry. Derived from sweep w2-atlas-r2 (byte-identical 16-path effects). Guards the persona-intent wiring: if an intent refactor decouples the two, this fails.

commands: (async () => { const un = (e) => (e && e.ok === true ? e.value : (e && e.ok === false ? null : e)); const r = window.__canaryLoadDDV({ select: false }); if (!r || !r.ok) throw new Error('LoadDDV failed'); const reset = async () => { window.__canaryClearTouchedPerfFields(); window.__canaryApplyProfile('minimal'); await window.__canaryWaitForRenderSettled(5000); }; const snap = () => JSON.stringify({ aj: un(window.__canaryGetPerfSettings()).activeJunction, frame: un(window.__canaryGetFrameGeometry({ includeJunctions: true })) }); await reset(); window.__canarySetPersonaEnabled('render.junction.center', true, { preserveProfile: true }); await window.__canaryWaitForRenderSettled(5000); const viaPersona = snap(); await reset(); window.__canarySetPerfSettings({ activeJunction: 'center' }, { markTouched: false }); await window.__canaryWaitForRenderSettled(5000); const viaPerf = snap(); await reset(); if (viaPersona !== viaPerf) throw new Error('EQUIVALENCE BROKEN: junction persona and activeJunction perf write no longer produce identical state (lengths ' + viaPersona.length + ' vs ' + viaPerf.length + ')'); return 'pass: junction persona == activeJunction perf write (identical frame geometry)'; })()
